reasoning: Major disagreement between models on whether this is a scorable performance attempt. Claude identified this as tutorial content with instructional slides and no clear timing markers, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task in 65.5 seconds. Given the fundamental disagreement about video content type and the lack of clear timing markers described by Claude, the conservative approach is to treat this as incomplete/non-scorable content.
